series_metadata.series_description: This includes support information including historic reports on cores taken on projects and supplement 1064 worksheets. The MATERIAL TEST WORKSHEETS contain the hand written notations, internal lab numbers and test results obtained by ODOT technicians during the physical testing of a sample of a Producer/Supplier''s material.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Retain on shared electronic database (Site Manager) permanently., Electronic: Permanent
